message:
refactor(runtime): resolve Presenter ownership with Option wrapping and counting_writer access

Wrap TerminalWriter.presenter field in Option<Presenter<W>> to enable
clean ownership transfer in into_inner() without leaving dangling refs.

- Remove problematic writer() method that panicked with type mismatch
  explanation; replace with presenter_mut() helper that safely unwraps
  the Option with descriptive panic on None
- New writer() delegates to presenter_mut().counting_writer_mut() for
  direct CountingWriter access
- Update into_inner() to take presenter via Option::take() and call
  presenter.into_inner() instead of the old writer reference
- Update cleanup() and best_effort_inline_cleanup() to work through
  the Option<Presenter> pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
